prompt_text: How can a brand measure whether ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Chinese AI engines mention it?
response:
# Measuring Brand Mentions in AI Engines

This emerging practice is called **AI Search Optimization (AISO)** or **Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)**. Here are the main approaches:

## Manual Testing Methods
- **Prompt sampling**: Regularly ask AI engines questions your customers would ask (e.g., "What are the best [category] tools?", "Who are the top providers of X?")
- **Competitor benchmarking**: Check if competitors appear when you don't
- **Prompt variation testing**: Test different phrasings to understand consistency

## Automated/Systematic Approaches
- **API querying at scale**: Use OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google APIs to run hundreds of prompts programmatically and log responses
- **Tracking spreadsheets/dashboards**: Log mention frequency, sentiment, and context over time
- **A/B prompt testing**: Vary prompts to identify which contexts trigger brand mentions

## Emerging Tools
- **Brandwatch, Mention** (adding AI monitoring features)
- **Profound**, **Otterly.AI**, **Peec.ai** — purpose-built AI visibility trackers
- **Semrush / Ahrefs** are developing GEO features

## Chinese AI Engines (Baidu Ernie, Kimi, DeepSeek, Doubao)
- Requires **Chinese-language prompt testing**
- May need local partners or agencies
- API access varies by platform

## Key Metrics to Track
| Metric | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Mention rate** | % of relevant prompts that include your brand |
| **Sentiment** | Positive/neutral/negative framing |
| **Position** | First mentioned vs. listed later |
| **Context accuracy** | Is information correct? |
| **Share of voice** | Your mentions vs. competitors |

## Why It's Challenging
- AI responses are **non-deterministic** (vary each query)
- Models update frequently
- No equivalent of Google Search Console exists yet

---
*Sources: [Otterly.AI](https://otterly.ai), [Profound](https://www.profound.com), [Search Engine Journal on GEO](https://www.searchenginejournal.com)*
